title: Sector reader output (claim + source)
description: Adapted from anthropics/financial-services @ 1c2ece3467c3434ddd01e655970e35b773940a29 — managed-agent-cookbooks/market-researcher/subagents/sector-reader.yaml. Apache 2.0 (preserved). Adapted 2026-05-09 for Mahoraga: a Researcher leaf-worker that ingests UNTRUSTED third-party reports or issuer materials and returns claim/source pairs only. The (claim, source) pairing enforces our no-unsourced-numbers discipline at the contract layer rather than relying on prompt instructions alone.
